opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: This pain hit my back like a sledgehammer and shoots right down into my groin, I can't find a single comfortable position!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden severe pain in my side and back that came on 2 hours ago, can't get comfortable and keep vomiting.

symptom_narrative.duration: constant since it started, comes in waves of intensity
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, excruciating, like being hit with a sledgehammer
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: excruciating, worst pain I've ever had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right side of my back, shooting straight down into my groin and testicle
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing, I can't find any position that helps, I just keep moving
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing specific makes it worse, it just comes in waves
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: vomited three times, feel sick, painful and urgent need to urinate, noticed pink-tinged urine last time I went
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't stay still, pacing and writhing, can't focus on anything else

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some about an hour ago, no relief at all

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: in severe pain, wants urgent pain relief and to know what's happening

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes symptoms clearly despite significant pain, may be pacing while typing
